phrases.intent_en: Ask where the herb garden is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a área das ervas aromáticas?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH ah AH-ree-ah dahs ER-vahs ah-roh-MAH-chee-kahs
phrases.cultural_note: Jardins de ervas em Portugal destacam plantas medicinais e culinárias regionais.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, encontra-se perto do coreto.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH PEHR-too DOO koo-REH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is found near the bandstand.

responses.english: Good morning, it is found near the bandstand.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH PEHR-too DOO koo-REH-too.
responses.french: Bom dia, encontra-se perto do coreto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the herb garden is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o jardim de ervas aromáticas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Os jardins de ervas aromáticas são comuns em espaços públicos portugueses, muitas vezes usados para educação e lazer.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o jardim de ervas aromáticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the herb garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the herb garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o jardim de ervas aromáticas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the medieval walls are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as muralhas medievais do jardim?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh meh-deeih-VEYESH DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN?
phrases.cultural_note: Muralhas medievais em Faro são vestígios da ocupação islâmica e cristã da cidade.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para as muralhas medievais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh meh-deeih-VEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the medieval walls.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the medieval walls.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh meh-deeih-VEYESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para as muralhas medievais.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o miradouro da ria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Miradouros em Faro oferecem vistas tradicionais sobre os canais da ria Formosa.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o miradouro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the estuary viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o miradouro da ria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Pontos de observação em jardins históricos privilegiam a paisagem urbana e fluvial.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o miradouro da ria.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH REEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the estuary viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the estuary viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DUH REEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o miradouro da ria.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar uma banca de gelados perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OO-muh BAHNNG-kuh DIH zheh-LAH-doosh PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Há uma banca de gelados lateral.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH OO-muh BAHNNG-kuh DIH zheh-LAH-doosh luh-tih-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: There is a side ice cream stand.

responses.english: There is a side ice cream stand.
responses.phonetic: AH OO-muh BAHNNG-kuh DIH zheh-LAH-doosh luh-tih-RAHL.
responses.french: Há uma banca de gelados lateral.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o jardim de ervas aromáticas?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka oo jar-DJEE jee-ER-vahs ah-roh-MAH-tchee-kahs
phrases.cultural_note: Jardins portugueses frequentemente separam áreas temáticas por aromas e texturas.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao coreto histórico.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW koo-REH-too eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the historic bandstand.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the historic bandstand.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW koo-REH-too eesh-TAW-ree-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto ao coreto histórico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the natural juice kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de sumos naturais?
phrases.cultural_note: Quiosques em jardins públicos portugueses servem bebidas frescas típicas do Algarve.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, localiza-se junto à banca de gelados.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH BAHNNG-kuh DIH zheh-LAH-doosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is located next to the ice cream stand.

responses.english: Good morning, it is located next to the ice cream stand.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, loo-kuh-LEE-zuh-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH BAHNNG-kuh DIH zheh-LAH-doosh.
responses.french: Bom dia, localiza-se junto à banca de gelados.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca de gelados?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BAHNNG-kuh DIH zheh-LAH-doosh?

likely_response.translation_en: It's on the side of the garden.

responses.english: It's on the side of the garden.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the walkway over the estuary is
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os passadiços sobre a ria?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng OOSH puh-suh-DEE-soosh SOHB-rih AH REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Passadiços em parques algarvios protegem a vegetação ribeirinha nativa.

likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs in the garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs in the garden.
